  #uptime-tooltip .tooltip-box .outage-field {
    /*
      Generate the background-color for the outage-field from the css_body_background_color and css_border_color.

      For the default background (#ffffff) and default css_border_color (#e0e0e0), use the luminosity of the default background with a magic number to arrive at
      the original outage-field background color (#f4f5f7). I used the formula Target Color = Color * alpha + Background * (1 - alpha) to find the magic number of ~0.08.

      For darker css_body_background_color, luminosity values are lower so alpha trends toward becoming transparent (thus outage-field background becomes same as css_body_background_color).
    */
    background-color: rgba(224,224,224,0.31);

    /*
      outage-field border-color alpha is inverse to the luminosity of css_body_background_color.
      That is to say, with a default white background this border is transparent, but on a black background, it's opaque css_border_color.
    */
    border-color: rgba(224,224,224,0.0);
  }

      ],

  // Store mapping of component IDs to incident IDs
  let componentToIncidentMapping = {};

  // Fetch and update component statuses from statuspage.io API
  function updateComponentStatuses() {
    // First, fetch incidents to know which components are affected and by which incident
    Promise.all([
      fetch("/api/v2/components.json").then((r) => r.json()),
      fetch("/api/v2/incidents/unresolved.json").then((r) => r.json()),
      fetch("/api/v2/scheduled-maintenances/active.json").then((r) => r.json()),
    ])
      .then(([componentsData, incidentsData, maintenanceData]) => {
        const components = componentsData.components;

        // Clear previous mapping
        componentToIncidentMapping = {};

        // Build mapping of component ID to incident ID
        const allIncidents = [
          ...(incidentsData.incidents || []),
          ...(maintenanceData.scheduled_maintenances || []),
        ];

        allIncidents.forEach((incident) => {
          incident.components.forEach((comp) => {
            componentToIncidentMapping[comp.id] = incident.id;
          });
        });

        // Update each component's status in the UI
        components.forEach((component) => {
          const componentId = component.id;
          const componentStatus = component.status;
          const incidentId = componentToIncidentMapping[componentId];

          // Find which region and stage this component belongs to
          for (const region in componentMapping) {
            for (const stage in componentMapping[region]) {
              if (componentMapping[region][stage][componentId]) {
                const componentName =
                  componentMapping[region][stage][componentId];
                updateComponentUI(
                  region,
                  stage,
                  componentName,
                  componentStatus,
                  incidentId,
                );
              }
            }
          }
        });

        // Update stage-level status indicators
        updateStageStatuses();
      })
      .catch((error) => {
        // Error fetching component statuses
      });
  }

  // Update stage-level status indicators based on child components
  function updateStageStatuses() {
    // For each region
    ["US", "EU"].forEach((region) => {
      const regionPanel = document.getElementById(`region-${region}`);
      if (!regionPanel) return;

      // Get all stage cards in this region
      const stageCards = regionPanel.querySelectorAll(".stage-card");
      stageCards.forEach((stageCard) => {
        const stageBody = stageCard.querySelector(".stage-body");
        const stageStatusDot = stageCard.querySelector(".stage-status");

        if (!stageBody || !stageStatusDot) return;

        // Get all component status dots within this stage
        const componentDots = stageBody.querySelectorAll(
          ".component-status .status-dot",
        );

        let hasIssue = false;
        let hasMaintenance = false;

        componentDots.forEach((dot) => {
          const bgColor = dot.style.backgroundColor;
          // Check for red (any issue)
          if (
            bgColor.includes("223, 45, 36") ||
            bgColor === "var(--nr-error)" ||
            bgColor === "#df2d24" ||
            bgColor === "rgb(223, 45, 36)" ||
            bgColor.includes("223, 45, 36")
          ) {
            hasIssue = true;
          } else if (
            bgColor.includes("12, 116, 223") ||
            bgColor === "#0c74df" ||
            bgColor === "#0c74df"
          ) {
            hasMaintenance = true;
          }
        });

        // Set stage status: Red for any issue, Blue for maintenance, Green for operational
        if (hasIssue) {
          stageStatusDot.style.backgroundColor = "#df2d24";
          stageStatusDot.style.color = "#df2d24";
          stageStatusDot.style.boxShadow = "0 0 8px rgba(223, 45, 36, 0.6)";
        } else if (hasMaintenance) {
          stageStatusDot.style.backgroundColor = "#0c74df";
          stageStatusDot.style.color = "#0c74df";
          stageStatusDot.style.boxShadow = "0 0 8px rgba(12, 116, 223, 0.4)";
        } else {
          // All operational
          stageStatusDot.style.backgroundColor = "var(--nr-green)";
          stageStatusDot.style.color = "var(--nr-green)";
          stageStatusDot.style.boxShadow = "0 0 6px rgba(17, 166, 0, 0.5)";
        }
      });
    });
  }

  // Update individual component UI based on status
  function updateComponentUI(region, stage, componentName, status, incidentId) {
    // Determine which region panel to target
    const regionPanel = document.getElementById(`region-${region}`);
    if (!regionPanel) return;

    // Find the stage card by title
    const stageCards = regionPanel.querySelectorAll(".stage-card");
    let targetStageCard = null;

    stageCards.forEach((card) => {
      const stageTitle = card.querySelector(".stage-title");
      if (stageTitle && stageTitle.textContent.trim() === stage.trim()) {
        targetStageCard = card;
      }
    });

    if (!targetStageCard) return;

    // Find the component item by name within this specific stage
    const componentItems = targetStageCard.querySelectorAll(".component-item");
    componentItems.forEach((item) => {
      const nameElement = item.querySelector(".component-name");
      if (
        nameElement &&
        nameElement.textContent.trim() === componentName.trim()
      ) {
        const statusDot = item.querySelector(".status-dot");
        const statusText = item.querySelector(".status-text");

        // Update status based on component status
        if (status === "operational") {
          statusDot.style.backgroundColor = "var(--nr-green)";
          statusText.textContent = "No issues detected";
          statusText.style.color = "var(--nr-green)";
          // Remove link if component is operational
          makeComponentNonClickable(nameElement);
        } else if (status === "under_maintenance") {
          statusDot.style.backgroundColor = "#0c74df";
          statusText.textContent = "Under maintenance";
          statusText.style.color = "#0c74df";
          // Make component clickable and link to incident
          if (incidentId) {
            makeComponentClickable(nameElement, incidentId);
          }
        } else {
          // All other statuses (degraded_performance, partial_outage, major_outage) = RED
          statusDot.style.backgroundColor = "#df2d24";
          statusText.textContent = "Issue detected";
          statusText.style.color = "#df2d24";
          // Make component clickable and link to incident
          if (incidentId) {
            makeComponentClickable(nameElement, incidentId);
          }
        }
      }
    });
  }

  // Make a component name clickable and link to incident
  function makeComponentClickable(nameElement, incidentId) {
    // Debug log to verify function is being called
    console.log(
      "Making clickable:",
      nameElement.textContent,
      "incidentId:",
      incidentId,
    );

    // Check if already a link
    if (nameElement.tagName === "A") {
      nameElement.href = `/incidents/${incidentId}`;
      return;
    }

    // Store original text
    const componentText = nameElement.textContent;

    // Create link
    const link = document.createElement("a");
    link.href = `/incidents/${incidentId}`;
    link.textContent = componentText;
    link.style.color = "inherit";
    link.style.textDecoration = "none";
    link.style.cursor = "pointer";

    // Add hover effect
    link.addEventListener("mouseenter", function () {
      this.style.textDecoration = "underline";
    });
    link.addEventListener("mouseleave", function () {
      this.style.textDecoration = "none";
    });

    // Replace text with link
    nameElement.textContent = "";
    nameElement.appendChild(link);
  }

  // Remove link from component name
  function makeComponentNonClickable(nameElement) {
    const link = nameElement.querySelector("a");
    if (link) {
      const text = link.textContent;
      nameElement.textContent = text;
    }
  }

  // Store incident to components mapping from API
  let incidentComponentsMapping = {};

  // Fetch incidents and map their components
  function fetchIncidentComponents() {
    Promise.all([
      fetch("/api/v2/incidents/unresolved.json").then((r) => r.json()),
      fetch("/api/v2/scheduled-maintenances/active.json").then((r) => r.json()),
    ])
      .then(([incidentsData, maintenanceData]) => {
        const allIncidents = [
          ...(incidentsData.incidents || []),
          ...(maintenanceData.scheduled_maintenances || []),
        ];

        // Clear previous mapping
        incidentComponentsMapping = {};

        // Build mapping of incident ID to component names by region (with group info)
        allIncidents.forEach((incident) => {
          const incidentId = incident.id;
          const componentsByRegion = {
            US: [],
            EU: [],
          };

          incident.components.forEach((comp) => {
            const componentId = comp.id;

            // Check which region and stage this component belongs to
            for (const region in componentMapping) {
              for (const stage in componentMapping[region]) {
                if (componentMapping[region][stage][componentId]) {
                  const componentName =
                    componentMapping[region][stage][componentId];
                  const componentWithGroup = `${stage} - ${componentName}`;
                  if (
                    !componentsByRegion[region].includes(componentWithGroup)
                  ) {
                    componentsByRegion[region].push(componentWithGroup);
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          });

          incidentComponentsMapping[incidentId] = componentsByRegion;
        });

        // Update incidents with component info
        addAffectedComponentsToIncidents();
      })
      .catch((error) => {
        // Error fetching incidents
      });
  }

  // Add affected components info to incidents using API data
  function addAffectedComponentsToIncidents() {
    const allIncidents = document.querySelectorAll(
      ".unresolved-incident, .scheduled-maintenance",
    );

    allIncidents.forEach((incident) => {
      // Skip if we already added the affected info
      if (incident.querySelector(".incident-affected-info")) {
        return;
      }

      // Try to get incident/maintenance ID from link
      const incidentLink =
        incident.querySelector('a[href*="/incidents/"]') ||
        incident.querySelector('a[href*="/scheduled-maintenances/"]');
      if (!incidentLink) {
        return;
      }

      const href = incidentLink.getAttribute("href");
      const match = href.match(
        /\/(incidents|scheduled-maintenances)\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)/,
      );
      if (!match) {
        return;
      }

      const incidentId = match[2];
      const componentsByRegion = incidentComponentsMapping[incidentId];

      if (!componentsByRegion) {
        return;
      }

      // Create the affected components info element
      const affectedInfo = document.createElement("div");
      affectedInfo.className = "incident-affected-info";

      let infoHTML = "";

      // Add US components if any
      if (componentsByRegion.US && componentsByRegion.US.length > 0) {
        infoHTML += `<span class="affected-region-label">Affected (US):</span> ${componentsByRegion.US.join(", ")}`;
      }

      // Add EU components if any
      if (componentsByRegion.EU && componentsByRegion.EU.length > 0) {
        if (infoHTML) infoHTML += "<br>";
        infoHTML += `<span class="affected-region-label">Affected (EU):</span> ${componentsByRegion.EU.join(", ")}`;
      }

      if (infoHTML) {
        affectedInfo.innerHTML = infoHTML;

        // Find the update container and insert at the end
        const updateContainer = incident.querySelector(".update");
        if (updateContainer) {
          updateContainer.appendChild(affectedInfo);
        } else {
          // Fallback: append to incident itself
          incident.appendChild(affectedInfo);
        }
      }
    });
  }

  function toggleStage(card) {
    // If clicking the same card, collapse it
    if (currentlyExpanded === card) {
      card.classList.remove("expanded");
      currentlyExpanded = null;
      return;
    }

    // Collapse previously expanded card
    if (currentlyExpanded) {
      currentlyExpanded.classList.remove("expanded");
    }

    // Expand clicked card
    card.classList.add("expanded");
    currentlyExpanded = card;

    // Scroll the expanded card's body to top
    const stageBody = card.querySelector(".stage-body");
    if (stageBody) {
      stageBody.scrollTop = 0;
    }
  }

  // Switch region
  function switchRegion(region) {
    currentRegion = region;

    // Update tab active states
    document.querySelectorAll(".region-tab").forEach((tab) => {
      tab.classList.remove("active");
      if (tab.dataset.region === region) {
        tab.classList.add("active");
      }
    });

    // Show/hide region panels
    document.querySelectorAll(".region-tab-panel").forEach((panel) => {
      panel.classList.remove("active");
    });
    document.getElementById(`region-${region}`).classList.add("active");

    updateTimestamp();
  }

  // Toggle dev menu
  function toggleDevMenu() {
    const menu = document.getElementById("devMenu");
    menu.classList.toggle("open");
  }

  // Toggle mobile view
  function toggleMobileView() {
    const body = document.body;
    const btn = document.getElementById("mobileToggleBtn");

    body.classList.toggle("mobile-view");

    if (body.classList.contains("mobile-view")) {
      btn.classList.add("active");
      btn.textContent = "💻 Desktop View";
    } else {
      btn.classList.remove("active");
      btn.textContent = "📱 Mobile View";
    }
  }

  // Trigger incident
  function triggerIncident(incidentId) {
    const incident = incidents[incidentId];
    if (!incident) return;

    currentIncident = incidentId;
    toggleDevMenu();

    // Determine which region's elements to target based on current region
    const regionSuffix = currentRegion === "US" ? "" : currentRegion;
    const incidentBannerId =
      currentRegion === "US"
        ? "incidentBanner"
        : `incidentBanner${regionSuffix}`;
    const incidentTitleId =
      currentRegion === "US" ? "incidentTitle" : `incidentTitle${regionSuffix}`;
    const incidentMessageId =
      currentRegion === "US"
        ? "incidentMessage"
        : `incidentMessage${regionSuffix}`;
    const incidentStartTimeId =
      currentRegion === "US"
        ? "incidentStartTime"
        : `incidentStartTime${regionSuffix}`;

    // Update incident banner for current region
    const incidentBanner = document.getElementById(incidentBannerId);
    const incidentTitle = document.getElementById(incidentTitleId);
    const incidentMessage = document.getElementById(incidentMessageId);
    const incidentStartTime = document.getElementById(incidentStartTimeId);

    if (incidentBanner) {
      incidentBanner.className = `incident-banner active ${incident.severity}`;
    }
    if (incidentTitle) {
      incidentTitle.textContent = incident.title;
    }
    if (incidentMessage) {
      incidentMessage.textContent = incident.message;
    }
    if (incidentStartTime) {
      incidentStartTime.textContent = new Date().toLocaleTimeString();
    }

    // Get the current region panel
    const regionPanel = document.getElementById(`region-${currentRegion}`);
    if (!regionPanel) return;

    // Update impacted stages within current region only
    incident.impactedStages.forEach((stageNum) => {
      const stageCard = regionPanel.querySelector(
        `.stage-card[data-stage="${stageNum}"]`,
      );
      if (stageCard) {
        const statusDot = stageCard.querySelector(".stage-status");
        statusDot.classList.remove("degraded", "maintenance");
        if (incident.severity === "outage") {
          statusDot.style.backgroundColor = "#df2d24";
          statusDot.style.color = "#df2d24";
          statusDot.style.boxShadow = "0 0 8px rgba(223, 45, 36, 0.6)";
        } else if (incident.severity === "maintenance") {
          statusDot.classList.add("maintenance");
          statusDot.style.backgroundColor = "#0c74df";
          statusDot.style.color = "#0c74df";
          statusDot.style.boxShadow = "0 0 8px rgba(12, 116, 223, 0.4)";
        }
      }
    });

    // Update impacted components within current region only
    const allComponents = regionPanel.querySelectorAll(".component-item");
    allComponents.forEach((component) => {
      const componentName =
        component.querySelector(".component-name").textContent;
      if (incident.impactedComponents.includes(componentName)) {
        const statusDot = component.querySelector(".status-dot");
        const statusText = component.querySelector(".status-text");

        statusDot.classList.remove("degraded", "maintenance");
        statusText.classList.remove("degraded", "maintenance");

        if (incident.severity === "outage") {
          statusDot.style.backgroundColor = "#df2d24";
          statusText.textContent = "Issue detected";
          statusText.style.color = "#df2d24";
        } else if (incident.severity === "maintenance") {
          statusDot.classList.add("maintenance");
          statusText.classList.add("maintenance");
          statusDot.style.backgroundColor = "#0c74df";
          statusText.textContent = "Undergoing maintenance";
          statusText.style.color = "#0c74df";
        }
      }
    });
  }

  // Clear incident
  function clearIncident() {
    currentIncident = null;
    toggleDevMenu();

    // Hide incident banners for both regions
    const incidentBannerUS = document.getElementById("incidentBanner");
    const incidentBannerEU = document.getElementById("incidentBannerEU");

    if (incidentBannerUS) {
      incidentBannerUS.classList.remove("active");
    }
    if (incidentBannerEU) {
      incidentBannerEU.classList.remove("active");
    }

    // Reset all stage status indicators in both regions
    document.querySelectorAll(".stage-status").forEach((dot) => {
      dot.classList.remove("degraded", "maintenance");
      dot.style.backgroundColor = "var(--nr-green)";
      dot.style.color = "var(--nr-green)";
      dot.style.boxShadow = "0 0 6px rgba(17, 166, 0, 0.5)";
    });

    // Reset all component status indicators in both regions
    document.querySelectorAll(".component-item").forEach((component) => {
      const statusDot = component.querySelector(".status-dot");
      const statusText = component.querySelector(".status-text");

      statusDot.classList.remove("degraded", "maintenance");
      statusDot.style.backgroundColor = "var(--nr-green)";

      statusText.classList.remove("degraded", "maintenance");
      statusText.textContent = "No issues detected";
      statusText.style.color = "var(--nr-green)";
    });
  }

  // Update timestamp
  function updateTimestamp() {
    const timestamp = document.getElementById("lastUpdatedInline");
    if (timestamp) {
      const now = new Date();
      const timeString = now.toLocaleTimeString();
      timestamp.textContent = timeString;
    }
  }

  // No custom subscribe button setup needed - statuspage.io handles it natively

  // Initialize on page load
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    // Check if we're on the history page or incident detail page
    const isHistoryPage = window.location.pathname.includes("/history");
    const isIncidentPage = window.location.pathname.includes("/incidents/");

    if (isHistoryPage) {
      // Build incident region mapping from API
      buildIncidentRegionMapping();

      // Add region switcher to history page
      setTimeout(() => {
        addHistoryRegionSwitcher();

        // Apply default region filter (from localStorage or US)
        let selectedRegion = "US";
        try {
          selectedRegion =
            localStorage.getItem("historySelectedRegion") || "US";
        } catch (e) {
          // localStorage not available
        }

        // Wait a bit for API data to load before filtering
        setTimeout(() => {
          switchHistoryRegion(selectedRegion);
        }, 500);
      }, 100);

      // Hide custom content on history page
      hideCustomContent();
    } else if (isIncidentPage) {
      // On incident detail page - hide custom content
      hideCustomContent();
    } else {
      // On main status page - show everything and update
      updateTimestamp();
      setInterval(updateTimestamp, 30000);

      // Hide past incidents (shown on /history page instead)
      hidePastIncidents();

      // Move incidents above region selector
      moveIncidentsAboveRegionSelector();

      // Fetch incident components and add to UI
      setTimeout(fetchIncidentComponents, 500);
      // Refresh periodically for new incidents
      setInterval(fetchIncidentComponents, 30000);

      // Fetch and update component statuses
      updateComponentStatuses();
      // Refresh component statuses every 60 seconds
      setInterval(updateComponentStatuses, 60000);
    }

    // Remove subscribe buttons from incidents (on all pages)
    removeSubscribeButtons();

    // Close dev menu when clicking outside
    document.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
      const devControls = document.querySelector(".dev-controls");
      const devMenu = document.getElementById("devMenu");

      if (
        devControls &&
        devMenu &&
        !devControls.contains(event.target) &&
        devMenu.classList.contains("open")
      ) {
        devMenu.classList.remove("open");
      }
    });
  });

  // Hide past incidents section (they will be shown on /history page instead)
  function hidePastIncidents() {
    const incidentsList = document.querySelector(".incidents-list");

    if (incidentsList) {
      incidentsList.style.display = "none";
    } else {
      // Retry after a short delay if element not found yet
      setTimeout(hidePastIncidents, 100);
    }
  }

  // Hide custom content on incident detail pages
  function hideCustomContent() {
    const customContent = document.querySelector(".nr-content");

    if (customContent) {
      customContent.style.display = "none";
    } else {
      // Retry after a short delay if element not found yet
      setTimeout(hideCustomContent, 100);
    }
  }

  // Move incidents above region selector
  function moveIncidentsAboveRegionSelector() {
    const unresolvedIncidents = document.querySelector(".unresolved-incidents");
    const scheduledMaintenance = document.querySelector(
      ".scheduled-maintenances-container",
    );
    const regionTabsNav = document.querySelector(".region-tabs-nav");

    if (!regionTabsNav) {
      setTimeout(moveIncidentsAboveRegionSelector, 100);
      return;
    }

    // Move scheduled maintenance above region tabs (first, if it exists)
    if (scheduledMaintenance) {
      regionTabsNav.parentNode.insertBefore(
        scheduledMaintenance,
        regionTabsNav,
      );
    }

    // Move unresolved incidents above region tabs (after scheduled maintenance if it exists)
    if (unresolvedIncidents) {
      if (scheduledMaintenance) {
        regionTabsNav.parentNode.insertBefore(
          unresolvedIncidents,
          scheduledMaintenance.nextSibling,
        );
      } else {
        regionTabsNav.parentNode.insertBefore(
          unresolvedIncidents,
          regionTabsNav,
        );
      }
    }
  }

  // Remove subscribe buttons from incidents only - preserve header subscribe
  function removeSubscribeButtons() {
    // Target only subscribe elements within incidents, not the header
    const incidentContainers = document.querySelectorAll(
      ".unresolved-incident, .incident, .scheduled-maintenance, .incidents-list",
    );

    incidentContainers.forEach((container) => {
      // Remove subscribe buttons and dropdowns within incident containers only
      const subscribeElements = container.querySelectorAll(
        ".subscribe, .flat-button, .updates-dropdown-container, button, a.flat-button",
      );

      subscribeElements.forEach((element) => {
        // Only remove if it's not our custom subscribe button
        if (!element.classList.contains("subscribe-btn-fixed")) {
          element.remove();
        }
      });
    });

    // Retry periodically in case new incidents are added dynamically
    setTimeout(removeSubscribeButtons, 2000);
  }

  // Store incident region mapping
  let incidentRegionMapping = {};

  // Build mapping of incident IDs to regions
  function buildIncidentRegionMapping() {
    fetch("/api/v2/incidents.json")
      .then((r) => r.json())
      .then((data) => {
        incidentRegionMapping = {};

        const allIncidents = data.incidents || [];

        allIncidents.forEach((incident) => {
          const incidentId = incident.id;
          const regions = new Set();

          // Check which region(s) this incident affects
          incident.components.forEach((comp) => {
            const componentId = comp.id;

            // Check US components
            for (const stage in componentMapping.US) {
              if (componentMapping.US[stage][componentId]) {
                regions.add("US");
                break;
              }
            }

            // Check EU components
            for (const stage in componentMapping.EU) {
              if (componentMapping.EU[stage][componentId]) {
                regions.add("EU");
                break;
              }
            }
          });

          // Store the regions for this incident
          incidentRegionMapping[incidentId] = Array.from(regions);
        });
      })
      .catch((error) => {
        // Silently fail - incidents will be shown in all regions
      });
  }

  // Switch history region
  function switchHistoryRegion(region) {
    // Update tab active states
    document.querySelectorAll(".region-tab").forEach((tab) => {
      tab.classList.remove("active");
      if (tab.dataset.region === region) {
        tab.classList.add("active");
      }
    });

    // Save preference to localStorage
    try {
      localStorage.setItem("historySelectedRegion", region);
    } catch (e) {
      // localStorage not available
    }

    // Filter incidents
    filterHistoryIncidentsByRegion(region);
  }

  // Filter history incidents by region
  function filterHistoryIncidentsByRegion(region) {
    const allIncidentContainers = document.querySelectorAll(
      ".incident-container",
    );

    allIncidentContainers.forEach((incidentElement) => {
      const incidentRegions = determineIncidentRegion(incidentElement);

      // Show incident if it affects the selected region, or if we don't know (fail open)
      if (incidentRegions.size === 0 || incidentRegions.has(region)) {
        incidentElement.style.display = "block";
      } else {
        incidentElement.style.display = "none";
      }
    });

    // Update month visibility
    updateMonthVisibility(region);
  }

  // Determine which region(s) an incident belongs to
  function determineIncidentRegion(incidentElement) {
    const regions = new Set();

    // Try to extract incident ID from the element
    const incidentLink = incidentElement.querySelector(
      'a[href*="/incidents/"]',
    );
    if (!incidentLink) {
      return regions; // Empty set = show in all regions
    }

    const href = incidentLink.getAttribute("href");
    const match = href.match(/\/incidents\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)/);
    if (!match) {
      return regions; // Empty set = show in all regions
    }

    const incidentId = match[1];
    const incidentRegions = incidentRegionMapping[incidentId];

    if (incidentRegions && incidentRegions.length > 0) {
      incidentRegions.forEach((region) => regions.add(region));
    }

    return regions;
  }

  // Update month visibility and show empty state messages
  function updateMonthVisibility(region) {
    const allMonths = document.querySelectorAll(".month");

    allMonths.forEach((monthElement) => {
      const visibleIncidents = monthElement.querySelectorAll(
        '.incident-container[style*="display: block"], .incident-container:not([style*="display: none"])',
      );
      const monthTitle = monthElement.querySelector(".month-title");

      // Remove any existing empty state message
      const existingMessage = monthElement.querySelector(
        ".no-incidents-for-region",
      );
      if (existingMessage) {
        existingMessage.remove();
      }

      // If no visible incidents, show empty state message
      if (visibleIncidents.length === 0 && monthTitle) {
        const emptyMessage = document.createElement("div");
        emptyMessage.className = "no-incidents-for-region";
        emptyMessage.textContent = `No incidents for ${region === "US" ? "United States" : "Europe"} in ${monthTitle.textContent}`;

        // Insert after month title
        monthTitle.parentNode.insertBefore(
          emptyMessage,
          monthTitle.nextSibling,
        );
      }
    });
  }

  // Add region switcher to history page
  function addHistoryRegionSwitcher() {
    // Wait for the history header to load
    const historyHeader =
      document.querySelector(".history-header") ||
      document.querySelector(
        ".layout-content.status-full-history > .container > h4",
      );

    if (!historyHeader) {
      setTimeout(addHistoryRegionSwitcher, 100);
      return;
    }

    // Check if region switcher already exists
    if (document.getElementById("historyRegionBtnSection")) {
      return;
    }

    // Create region switcher container with same class as main page
    const regionContainer = document.createElement("div");
    regionContainer.id = "historyRegionBtnSection";
    regionContainer.className = "region-tabs-nav";

    // Create US button
    const usButton = document.createElement("button");
    usButton.textContent = "United States";
    usButton.className = "region-tab active";
    usButton.dataset.region = "US";
    usButton.onclick = function () {
      switchHistoryRegion("US");
    };

    // Create EU button
    const euButton = document.createElement("button");
    euButton.textContent = "Europe";
    euButton.className = "region-tab";
    euButton.dataset.region = "EU";
    euButton.onclick = function () {
      switchHistoryRegion("EU");
    };

    // Append elements
    regionContainer.appendChild(usButton);
    regionContainer.appendChild(euButton);

    // Insert after the history header
    const container =
      document.querySelector(
        ".layout-content.status-full-history > .container",
      ) || document.querySelector(".layout-content.status-full-history");

    if (container) {
      // Find the title element
      const title =
        container.querySelector("h4") ||
        container.querySelector(".history-header h4");
      if (title) {
        title.parentNode.insertBefore(regionContainer, title.nextSibling);
      } else {
        container.insertBefore(regionContainer, container.firstChild);
      }
    }
  }

        } else {
          phoneNumberInput.prop('readonly', false);
          errorDiv.html('');
          if(false){
            if(isOtpEnabled){
              document.getElementById('subscribe-btn-sms').value = "Send OTP";

              isOtpFlow.value = false;
              document.getElementById('subscribe-btn-sms').value = "Subscribe via Text Message";

          }
        }
      }

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const dropdown = document.querySelector('#phone-number-country-code .phone-country');
    if (dropdown){
      const wrapperDiv = document.getElementById('phone-number-country-code');
      const selectedOption = dropdown.options[dropdown.selectedIndex];
      const otpEnabled = selectedOption.getAttribute('data-otp-enabled');

      wrapperDiv.setAttribute('data-otp-enabled', otpEnabled);

      dropdown.addEventListener('change', function() {
        const selectedOption = dropdown.options[dropdown.selectedIndex];
        const otpEnabled = selectedOption.getAttribute('data-otp-enabled');

        wrapperDiv.setAttribute('data-otp-enabled', otpEnabled);
      });
    }
  });

  var countdownTimer;
  var resendBtn = document.getElementById('resend');
  var timer = document.getElementById('timer');
  var form = document.getElementById('subscribe-form-sms');
  var RESEND_TIMER = 30;
  $(function() {
    $('#subscribe-form-sms').on('ajax:success', function(e, data, status, xhr){
      const form = this;
      const action = form.getAttribute('action');
      if (data.type === 'success' && data.otp_flow === true) {
        document.getElementById('subscriber_code').value = data.subscriber_code
        document.getElementById('otp-container').style.display = "block";
        $('#phone-number').prop('readonly', true);
        var display = document.getElementById('countdown');
        disableResend();
        startTimer(RESEND_TIMER, display)
        document.getElementById('subscribe-btn-sms').value = "Verify OTP and Subscribe";
        document.getElementById('otp_verify_flow').value = true;
        form.action = '/subscriptions/verify-otp';
      } else if (data.type === 'success' && action.includes('verify')){
        document.getElementById('otp-container').style.display = "none";
        $('#phone-number').val('').prop('readonly', false);
        $('#otp').val('');
        document.getElementById('subscribe-btn-sms').value = "Send OTP";
        document.getElementById('otp_verify_flow').value = false;
        form.action = '/subscriptions/new-sms';
        SP.currentPage.updatesDropdown.hide();
      }
    });
    $("#btn-subcriber-change-number").on('click', () => {
      document.getElementById('otp-container').style.display = "none";
      $('#phone-number').prop('readonly', false);
      document.getElementById('subscribe-btn-sms').value = "Send OTP";
      form.action = '/subscriptions/new-sms';
      return false
    })
    $('#resend-otp-btn').on('click', function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      let phoneNumber = $('#phone-number').val();
      let countryCode = $('.phone-country').val();
      $.ajax({
        type: 'POST',
        url: "/subscriptions/new-sms",
        data: {
          phone_number: phoneNumber,
          phone_country: countryCode,
          type: 'resend'
        },
      }).done(function(data) {
        var messageOptions = (data.type !== undefined && data.type !== null) ? { cssClass: data.type } : {};
        HRB.utils.notify(data.text, messageOptions);
        var display = document.getElementById('countdown');
        disableResend();
        timer.style.display = "none"
        if (data.type === 'success') {
          startTimer(RESEND_TIMER, display);
        }
      })
    });
  })

  function startTimer(duration, display){
    var timer = duration, seconds;
    clearInterval(countdownTimer);
    countdownTimer = setInterval(function () {
      seconds = parseInt(timer % 60, 10);
      display.textContent = seconds;
      if(--timer < 0){
        enableResend();
        clearInterval(countdownTimer);
      }
    }, 1000);
    disableResend();
  }
  function enableResend(){
    resendBtn.style.display = "block";
    timer.style.display = "none"
  }
  function disableResend(){
    resendBtn.style.display = "none";
    timer.style.display = "block"
  }

  $(function() {
    $('#subscribe-form-email').on('submit', function() {
      var tokenField = document.getElementById('email-otp-token-field');
      if (!tokenField) {
        return;
      }
      let page_code = "nwg5xmnm9d17"
      let key = keyForEmailOtpToken($('#email').val(), page_code);
      tokenField.value = localStorage.getItem(key);
    });
  });

  var emailOtpCountdownTimer;
  var emailOtpResendBtn = document.getElementById('resend-email-otp');
  var emailOtpTimer = document.getElementById('email-otp-timer');
  var emailOtpForm = document.getElementById('subscribe-form-email');
  var EMAIL_OTP_RESEND_TIMER = 600;
  $(function() {
    $('#subscribe-form-email').on('ajax:success', function(e, data, status, xhr){
      const form = this;
      const action = form.getAttribute('action');
      if (data.type === 'success' && data.email_otp_verify_flow === true) {
        document.getElementById('email-otp-container').style.display = "block";
        var display = document.getElementById('email-otp-countdown');
        display.textContent = EMAIL_OTP_RESEND_TIMER;
        disableEmailOtpResend();
        startEmailOtpTimer(EMAIL_OTP_RESEND_TIMER, display)
        document.getElementById('subscribe-btn-email').value = "Verify OTP and Subscribe";
        document.getElementById('email_otp_verify_flow').value = true;
        form.action = '/subscriptions/verify-email-otp';
      } else if (data.type === 'success' && action.includes('verify')){
        let email =  $('#email')
        let page_code = "nwg5xmnm9d17"
        let key = keyForEmailOtpToken(email.val(), page_code);
        localStorage.setItem(key, data.email_otp_auth_token);

        document.getElementById('email-otp-container').style.display = "none";
        email.val('').prop('readonly', false);
        $('#email-otp').val('');
        document.getElementById('subscribe-btn-email').value = "Send OTP";
        document.getElementById('email_otp_verify_flow').value = false;
        form.action = '/subscriptions/new-email';
        SP.currentPage.updatesDropdown.hide();
      }
    });
    $('#resend-email-otp-btn').on('click', function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      let email = $('#email').val();
      $.ajax({
        type: 'POST',
        url: "/subscriptions/new-email",
        data: {
          email: email
        },
      }).done(function(data) {
        var messageOptions = (data.type !== undefined && data.type !== null) ? { cssClass: data.type } : {};
        HRB.utils.notify(data.text, messageOptions);
        if (data.type === 'success') {
          var display = document.getElementById('email-otp-countdown');
          display.textContent = EMAIL_OTP_RESEND_TIMER;
          disableEmailOtpResend();
          emailOtpTimer.style.display = "none"
          startEmailOtpTimer(EMAIL_OTP_RESEND_TIMER, display);
        }
      })
    });
  })

  function startEmailOtpTimer(duration, display){
    var timer = duration, seconds;
    clearInterval(emailOtpCountdownTimer);
    emailOtpCountdownTimer = setInterval(function () {
      seconds = parseInt(timer, 10);
      display.textContent = seconds;
      if(--timer < 0){
        enableEmailOtpResend();
        clearInterval(emailOtpCountdownTimer);
      }
    }, 1000);
    disableEmailOtpResend();
  }

  function enableEmailOtpResend(){
    emailOtpResendBtn.style.display = "block";
    emailOtpTimer.style.display = "none"
  }
  function disableEmailOtpResend(){
    emailOtpResendBtn.style.display = "none";
    emailOtpTimer.style.display = "block"
  }
  function keyForEmailOtpToken(email, pageCode) {
    return email + '|' + pageCode+ '|SUBSCRIBE_VIA_EMAIL';
  }
</script>

          return;

      <script>
  /** INITIALIZATION **/
  var recaptchaIds = {}

  // Unfortunately there's no unique selectors on the parent divs that recaptcha adds. The first unique selector
  // is the iframe rendered 2 levels deep. So this waits until the iframes are added to the page, then finds
  // the parent div and sets the z index so that it'll render above our modals & dropdowns from the start.
  function setZIndex(captchaCount, startTime) {
    // bail after 10s just in case so we don't do this forever if something whaky happens
    if (new Date() - startTime > 10000) {
      return;
    }

    var iframes = document.querySelectorAll('iframe[title="recaptcha challenge"]');
    if (iframes.length != captchaCount) {
      setTimeout(function() {
        setZIndex(captchaCount, startTime);
      }, 500);
    }

    for (var i = 0; i < iframes.length; i++) {
      // incident subscribe modal is 1050, so this has to be above that
      iframes[i].parentElement.parentElement.style.zIndex = "1100";
    }
  }

  function updateCaptchaIframeTitle(captchaCount, startTime, updates=0) {

    if (new Date() - startTime > 10000 || captchaCount === updates) {
      return;
    }
    var iframesWithTitle = document.querySelectorAll('iframe[title="recaptcha challenge expires in two minutes"]');

    if (iframesWithTitle.length != captchaCount) {
      setTimeout(function() {
        updateCaptchaIframeTitle(captchaCount, startTime, iframesWithTitle.length + updates);
      }, 500);
    }

    for (var i = 0; i < iframesWithTitle.length; i++) {
      iframesWithTitle[i].title = "recaptcha";
    }
  }

  function addIncidentCaptcha() {
    var incidentCaptcha = document.createElement('div');
    incidentCaptcha.setAttribute('id', 'subscribe-incident-recaptcha');
    incidentCaptcha.setAttribute('class', 'g-recaptcha');
    incidentCaptcha.setAttribute('data-sitekey', '6LcZ-b0UAAAAAENi956aWzynTT2ZJ80dGU3F80Op');
    incidentCaptcha.setAttribute('data-callback', 'submitIncidentSubscriberSuccess');
    incidentCaptcha.setAttribute('data-error-callback', 'submitIncidentSubscriberError');
    incidentCaptcha.setAttribute('data-size', 'invisible');
    document.body.appendChild(incidentCaptcha);
    var incidentCode = document.createElement('input');
    incidentCode.setAttribute('type', 'hidden');
    incidentCode.setAttribute('id', 'submit_incident_code');
    document.body.appendChild(incidentCode);
  }

  var onloadCallback = function() {
    // if there is an incident, then add incident captcha element
    if (document.getElementsByClassName('modal-open-incident-subscribe').length > 0) {
      addIncidentCaptcha();
    }

    var captchas = document.getElementsByClassName("g-recaptcha");

    for(var i = 0; i < captchas.length; i++) {
      var elId = captchas[i].id;
      recaptchaIds[elId] = grecaptcha.enterprise.render(elId);
    }

    setZIndex(captchas.length, new Date());
    updateCaptchaIframeTitle(captchas.length, new Date());
  }


  /** SUBSCRIBE DROPDOWN */

  // callbacks for captcha success
  function submitNewSubscriber(type, error) {
    if (error) document.querySelector('#subscribe-form-' + type + ' #captcha_error').value = 'true';

    document.getElementById('subscribe-form-' + type).dispatchEvent(new Event('submit', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true}));
    grecaptcha.enterprise.reset(recaptchaIds['subscribe-btn-' + type]);
  }
  function submitNewEmailSubscriber(token) {
    submitNewSubscriber('email');
  }
  function submitNewSmsSubscriber(token) {
    submitNewSubscriber('sms');
  }
  function submitNewWebhookSubscriber(token) {
    submitNewSubscriber('webhook');
  }
  function submitIncidentSubscriber(token, error) {
    var incidentCode = document.getElementById('submit_incident_code').value;
    var incidentForm = document.getElementById('subscribe-form-' + incidentCode);

    incidentForm.querySelector('input[name="captcha_error"]').value = error;
    incidentForm.querySelector('input[name="g-recaptcha-response"]').value = token;
    incidentForm.dispatchEvent(new Event('submit', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true}));
    grecaptcha.enterprise.reset(recaptchaIds['subscribe-incident-recaptcha']);
  }
  function submitIncidentSubscriberSuccess(token) {
    submitIncidentSubscriber(token, 'false');
  }

  // callbacks if we get captcha network errors
  function emailSubscriberCaptchaError(token) {
    submitNewSubscriber('email', true);
  }
  function smsSubscriberCaptchaError(token) {
    submitNewSubscriber('sms', true);
  }
  function webhookSubscriberCaptchaError(token) {
    submitNewSubscriber('webhook', true);
  }
  function submitIncidentSubscriberError(token) {
    submitIncidentSubscriber(token, 'true');
  }

  // tracking clicks
  ['email', 'sms', 'webhook'].forEach(function(type) {
    var el = document.getElementById('subscribe-btn-' + type);
    el && el.addEventListener("click", function() {
      $.ajax({
        type: "POST",
        url: "/subscriptions/track_attempt",
        data: {
          type: type
        }
      })
    })
  })

  // form submission success callbacks
  $('#subscribe-form-email').on('ajax:success', function(e, data, status, xhr){
    if (data.type === 'success') {
      SP.currentPage.updatesDropdown.hide();
      var emailField = document.getElementById('email');
      if (emailField) {
        emailField.value = '';
      }
    }
  });
  $('#subscribe-form-sms').on('ajax:success', function(e, data, status, xhr){
    if (data.type === 'success' && data.otp_flow !== true) {
      SP.currentPage.updatesDropdown.hide();
      var phoneField = document.getElementById('phone-number');
      if (phoneField) {
        phoneField.value = '';

  });
  $('#subscribe-form-webhook').on('ajax:success', function(e, data, status, xhr){
    if (data.type === 'success') {

        type: 'incident'

    <script>
  window.addEventListener('load', function () {
    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const messageToken = urlParams.get('slack_message_token');
    const channelName = escape(urlParams.get('channel_name'));

    if(!!messageToken) {
      switch(messageToken) {
        case 'slack_auth_error':
          HRB.utils.notify('The Slack authorization attempt was unsuccessful. Try again.', {cssClass:'error'});
          break;
        case 'subscribers_disabled_error':
          HRB.utils.notify('Slack subscriptions are not enabled on this page.', {cssClass:'error'});
          break;
        case 'direct_message_channel_error':
          HRB.utils.notify('Subscriptions aren’t supported in direct messages. Try subscribing again and choose a channel instead.', {cssClass:'error'});
          break
        case 'duplicate_error':
          HRB.utils.notify("You're already subscribed to get Slack notifications in that channel.", {cssClass:'error'});
          break;
        case 'duplicate_private_channel_error':
          HRB.utils.notify(`You're already subscribed to get Slack notifications in #${channelName}. Invite the @Statuspage app to that channel to start getting status updates.`, {cssClass: 'error'});
          break;
        case 'default_success':
          HRB.utils.notify("You're now subscribed to get Statuspage updates in Slack!", {cssClass:'success'});
          break;
        case 'private_channel_success':
          HRB.utils.notify(`IMPORTANT: Invite the @Statuspage app to your Slack channel #${channelName} to start getting status updates.`, {cssClass:'success'});
          break;
      }
    }
  });
</script>
